# Generated by cguess.py
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(gedi CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(CURSES_NEED_WIDE TRUE) # Request wide-character Curses
find_package(Curses REQUIRED)

# Find libclang
find_path(CLANG_INCLUDE_DIR clang-c/Index.h)
find_library(CLANG_LIBRARY NAMES clang libclang)

include(FindPackageHandleStandardArgs)
find_package_handle_standard_args(Clang DEFAULT_MSG CLANG_LIBRARY CLANG_INCLUDE_DIR)

if(NOT CLANG_FOUND)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "libclang not found. Please install libclang-dev or equivalent.")
endif()

if(NOT CURSES_FOUND)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "ncurses not found. Please install libncurses-dev or equivalent")
endif()

if(CURSES_FOUND AND CLANG_FOUND)
    include_directories(${CURSES_INCLUDE_DIRS} ${CLANG_INCLUDE_DIR})
    add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME}
        gedi.cpp

        EditorBuffer.cpp
        Renderer.cpp
        TextEditor.cpp
        SyntaxHighlighter.cpp
        FileBrowser.cpp
        ConfigManager.cpp
        BuildSystem.cpp
        SearchEngine.cpp
        HelpProvider.cpp
        BufferManager.cpp
        KeyBindings.cpp
        MessageDialog.cpp
        QuestionDialog.cpp
        SettingsDialog.cpp
        ReplaceDialog.cpp
        GoToLineDialog.cpp
        CompileOptionsDialog.cpp
        BuildOutputDialog.cpp
        HelpDialog.cpp
        utils.cpp
        DialogBase.cpp

        BufferManager.h
        BuildOutputDialog.h
        BuildSystem.h
        CompileOptionsDialog.h
        CompilerSettings.h
        Config.h
        ConfigManager.h
        CyclicEnum.h
        DialogBase.h
        DialogResult.h
        EditorBuffer.h
        FileBrowser.h
        GoToLineDialog.h
        HelpDialog.h
        HelpProvider.h
        KeyBindings.h
        MessageDialog.h
        NavigationGraph.h
        QuestionDialog.h
        Renderer.h
        ReplaceDialog.h
        SearchEngine.h
        SettingsDialog.h
        SyntaxHighlighter.h
        TextEditor.h
        utils.h
        Widgets.h
    )

    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} ${CURSES_LIBRARIES} ${CLANG_LIBRARY})

endif()

install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME} DESTINATION bin)

# Install the configs, help file and python script to a shared data directory
install(
    FILES
        help.hlp
        colors.json
        config.json
    DESTINATION
        share/gedi
)

install(
    FILES
        cguess.py
    DESTINATION
        lib/python3/dist-packages/${PROJECT_NAME}
)
